claims.text: Meta launched Business Agent globally across WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger
the agent can answer customer questions, recommend products, book appointments, and qualify sales leads
the agent does not include a CRM, lead routing, or a follow-up sequence after the conversation ends
responding within 5 minutes meaningfully improves the odds of converting a lead

disclosure: Consumer behavior stats sourced from EZ Texting's 2026 Consumer Texting Behavior Report (959 US consumers). Lead-response multiplier sourced from the Kellogg School/Harvard Business Review lead response management study, cited generally without unverifiable business-specific figures.

claims.text: 87% of consumers check a new text within 15 minutes, 32% immediately
Nearly 70% of consumers expect a business to respond to a text within an hour
65% of consumers prefer appointment reminders by text over any other message type
Responding to a lead within 5 minutes makes you 21x more likely to qualify it than waiting 30 minutes
Owners should audit their last 20 leads for reply speed this week
